ddls:
CREATE TABLE "code_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code review submission */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the code review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer responsible for the assessment */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* The hash of the commit being reviewed */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* The name of the branch where the commit was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the code review (e.g., Pending, Completed, Rejected) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or feedback provided by the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_reviews_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last date the project was updated */,
  "lead_reviewer_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the lead reviewer for the project */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the project is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the code review this issue belongs to */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue (e.g., Warning, Error) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category the issue belongs to (e.g., coding) */,
  "rule" TEXT /* Specific rule that was violated */,
  "message" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number where the issue was found */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* The file path where the issue was found */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* The status of the issue resolution (e.g., Open, Fixed, Ignored) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the developer who resolved the issue */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* The date the issue was resolved */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or feedback regarding the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_rule FOREIGN KEY ("rule") REFERENCES rules ("rule_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES code_reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the reviewer (e.g., Senior Developer, QA Engineer) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the reviewer is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the reviewer was added to the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last date the reviewer logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coding rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the coding rule */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the rule */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* The severity level of the rule (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the rule is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the rule was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* The last date the rule was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)
